memoryArtifacts.headline: Family of Herbert from Annals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777
memoryArtifacts.description: Family of Herbert from Annuals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777. However, it is noted, that Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) was not the Count of Vermandois, but rather his uncle was, Herbert IV, Count of Vermandois. It is also noted that the son of Herbertus Camerarius, Henry FitzHerbert (Henry the Treasurer) is missing from the Annals and Antiquities, but his grandson Herbert (Herbert FitzHenry) and great grandson Herbert  (Herbert FitzHerbert) are included.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester於大約1136年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾時，她的父親Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford56歲，母親Sybil de Neufmarché37歲。她於1151年與Herbert FitzHerbert在威爾士結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1220年在英國格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利享年86歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester于大约1136年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾时，她的父亲Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford56岁，母亲Sybil de Neufmarché37岁。她于1151年与Herbert FitzHerbert在威尔士结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1220年在英国格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利享年86岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester was born about 1136, in Breconshire, Wales, her father, Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford, was 56 and her mother, Sybil de Neufmarché, was 37. She married Herbert FitzHerbert in 1151, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died about 1220, in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 86, and was buried in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester est née environ 1136, à Breconshire, Galles, son père, Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Sybil de Neufmarché, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Herbert FitzHerbert en 1151, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1220, à Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester um 1136 in Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford 56 und ihre Mutter Sybil de Neufmarché 37. Sie hat 1151 in Wales Herbert FitzHerbert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb um 1220 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester è nata il circa 1136 nel Breconshire, Galles, sua padre, Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Sybil de Neufmarché, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Herbert FitzHerbert nel 1151, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 1220, nel Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucesterが約1136年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Herefordは56歳，母Sybil de Neufmarchéは37歳であった。1151年にウェールズでHerbert FitzHerbertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1220年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアランソニー セクウンダ プリオリーで86歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアランソニー セクウンダ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester(이)가 대략 1136년 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil de Neufmarché(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1151년 웨일스에서 Herbert FitzHerbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1220년 영국 그루스스터실르 랜서니 세쿤다 플리오리에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 랜서니 세쿤다 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester nasceu aproximadamente 1136, em Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Sybil de Neufmarché, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Herbert FitzHerbert em 1151, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1220, em Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester родилась около 1136 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Neufmarché, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Herbert FitzHerbert в 1151 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла около 1220 г. в местности ллантони секунда приори, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности ллантони секунда приори, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester nació aproximadamente 1136, en Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Sybil de Neufmarché, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Herbert FitzHerbert en 1151, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1220, en Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
